note: simple case: clear pink blossoms on white ground
HARD: two nearby blues — tests off-target bleed via soft radius
HARD: non-white background + on-body — bbox membership clusters background near edges (raster signal)
REAL hanger sample, OFFLINE. Clean acceptance read: pink blossoms -> navy, low radius.
Add a SAM2 truth mask (white=skirt, black=wall) to measure offBg. White wall is far from pink, so expect offBg ~ small — this garment does NOT stress the raster signal.
Select the blue beaded clusters among black/pink/blue/green.

THE D1 RASTER SAMPLE (Architect's request): a warm print on a wood/peach surface (or on-body, skin near a warm motif). Background is color-near fromColor, so the bbox sweeps it in -> offBg should FAIL on bbox and land in RASTER-NEEDED. This is where SAM2 earns the spend.
